name: Pasta with Garlic and Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
2. Heat the olive oil in a small frying pan over medium heat.
3. Add the minced garlic to the pan and sauté for just a moment until fragrant.
4. Drain the cooked pasta, reserving some of the cooking water if needed.
5. Toss the drained pasta with the garlic-infused oil mixture.
6. Add the beaten eggs, Parmesan cheese, salt, and pepper. Mix gently until well combined.
7. Adjust seasoning to taste.
